journey_results.name: Visitor to Intelligence Preview to Signup to Free Tier

steps.note: Accessible but not linked from PrelaunchQuiz
Text link in RequestAccess success state

dead_ends: PrelaunchGuard intercepts /intelligence for unauthenticated visitors — primary value proposition invisible
PrelaunchQuiz has no CTA linking to intelligence preview or /request-access

journey_results.name: Free Tier to Paywall Moment to Upgrade to Paid Intelligence

steps.note: UpgradePrompt links here — DEMO hardcoded page, no Stripe
No Stripe checkout reached from TierGate path

dead_ends: TierGate UpgradePrompt links to /pricing (DEMO static page), not to startCheckout()
No payment can be initiated from the paywall moment — upgrade journey is broken

journey_results.name: Operator to CRM to Contact Detail to Rebooking

steps.note: Book Appointment CTA confirmed in ContactDetail

journey_results.name: Operator to Intelligence Signal to Create CRM Note

steps.note: Signal panel exists; no confirmed save-to-CRM CTA from IntelligenceHub
handleLinkSignal confirmed; creates signal_link note on contact
signal_link entries appear in contact timeline

journey_results.notes: Cross-hub action works contact-to-signal direction only. Signal-to-contact from IntelligenceHub not confirmed.

journey_results.name: Brand Admin to Intelligence Signal to Campaign

steps.note: Signal selected but no campaign CTA found
Hub links here instead of to campaign creation
Exists but not linked from signal action surface

dead_ends: BrandIntelligenceHub has no direct CTA from signal to /brand/campaigns/new
/brand/intelligence-pricing (link destination from intelligence hub) is a SHELL page

journey_results.name: Admin to Feed Management to Feed Health to Edit Feed

steps.note: AdminFeedsHub with feed list and inline health
Feed health metrics shown inline — no separate route needed

journey_results.name: User to Education to Course to Quiz to Certificate

steps.note: Hardcoded static page; no live course list; CTA goes to /portal/signup not /courses
Page exists but CoursePlayer has no link to it after completion

dead_ends: /education landing is a shell — no live course listings, misleading entry point
CoursePlayer has no completion screen or certificate CTA after all lessons complete

journey_results.name: User to Jobs to Job Detail to Apply

steps.note: JobDetail Apply Now links to /portal/signup for unauthenticated
Portal apply route for authenticated users

journey_results.name: User to Events to Event Detail to Register
dead_ends: No /events/:slug or /events/:id route registered — events listing is a dead end
No event registration flow exists anywhere in the route tree

journey_results.name: Visitor to For Brands to Request Access to Signup

dead_ends.description: Events listing is LIVE but no event detail route exists. No registration flow anywhere.
CoursePlayer has no completion screen or certificate CTA after all lessons and quizzes complete.
PrelaunchGuard blocks /intelligence for unauthenticated visitors. Primary value proposition invisible pre-signup.
TierGate upgrade path leads to DEMO /pricing page. No Stripe checkout reachable. Paywall cannot convert.
BrandIntelligenceHub has no cross-hub CTA from signal to /brand/campaigns/new.
Education landing is a shell with no live course listings. Entry point for education journey is misleading.
Signup CTA in success state is a text link, not a button. Minor conversion friction.

orphaned_routes: /home — not in MainNav; MainNav links /intelligence which is a different component
/for-medspas — not in MainNav; direct URL only
/for-salons — not in MainNav; direct URL only
/api/docs — not in MainNav; developer audience only
/api/pricing — not in MainNav; developer audience only
/case-studies — not in MainNav; footer status unverified
/marketing/* — MarketingLayout hub with no confirmed nav entry point from main site
/sales/* (top-level) — parallel to /portal/sales/*; not in main nav; potential duplicate
/portal/marketing-hub/* — separate from /portal/marketing/*; potential duplicate hub within portal
/pricing — separate from /plans; no canonical preference; both unreachable from main nav concurrently
/education/articles — not linked from /education landing or education navigation
/help — separate from /help/:slug CMS route; not in MainNav
failures: Journey 1: PrelaunchGuard blocks intelligence for unauthenticated visitors — primary value proposition invisible
Journey 2: TierGate upgrade path terminates at DEMO pricing page; no checkout reachable
Journey 5: BrandIntelligenceHub has no signal-to-campaign cross-hub CTA
Journey 7: /education is a shell; CoursePlayer has no certificate CTA post-completion
Journey 9: No event detail route registered; entire events registration flow missing

recommended_fixes_by_priority.fix: Add completion screen to CoursePlayer with CTA to /my-certificates
Wire TierGate UpgradePrompt to startCheckout() instead of /pricing
Add public intelligence preview path — either remove PrelaunchGuard from /intelligence or create a dedicated preview route
Add signal-to-campaign CTA in BrandIntelligenceHub pointing to /brand/campaigns/new
Replace /education shell with live course listings or redirect to /courses
Consolidate /portal/marketing/* and /portal/marketing-hub/* to eliminate duplicate hub
Establish canonical pricing page between /plans and /pricing
